column1: # OTel file-exporter WRITER filesystem policy (C2 — JSONL span export off the VM thread).
# Every `write_all` / `fs::write` in the sema-otel crate MUST live on the dedicated file
# WRITER thread (file_exporter.rs `writer_loop`). The VM thread only renders each span to a
# `String` and `try_send`s it; the OTLP batch path performs no `fs` writes here. This pins
# the writes to file_exporter.rs at exact counts; a `write_all`/`fs::write` in ANY other
# sema-otel file (a regressed synchronous per-span-end write on the VM thread) is
# unallowlisted and fails. The scan comment-strips and counts the production module only

column4: rendered JSONL span line, on the writer thread
